commands: docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 sh -lc "mysql -h '$DB_HOST' -P '$DB_PORT' -u '$ROOT_USER' -p'$ROOT_PASS' -e \"CREATE USER IF NOT EXISTS '$DB_USER'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY '$DB_PASS'; ALTER USER '$DB_USER'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY '$DB_PASS'; CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS $DB_NAME CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON $DB_NAME.* TO '$DB_USER'@'%'; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;\""
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend install-app erpnext || true"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend migrate || true"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend list-apps || true"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench use frontend"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench set-config -g host_name http://44.198.225.186"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend set-config host_name http://44.198.225.186"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 sh -lc "printf frontend > /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/currentsite.txt && ln -sfn frontend /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/44.198.225.186"
